$description: Main Page Token 2 — Wikipedia-register knowledge home page. Visual contract for app-mediakit-knowledge home_chrome(). Per-tenant parameterised (documentation / corporate / projects). Master co-sign: master@claude-code 2026-05-07T04:55Z.

slot.$description: Canonical slot ordering for the home page. Matches Wikipedia Main Page anatomy. Implementation: home_chrome() in app-mediakit-knowledge/src/server.rs.

order.$description: Render order top to bottom. Slots may be suppressed per-tenant (see slot.*.visible rules).

banner.$description: Site title, tagline, stats line. Per-tenant: site_title, site_tagline.

stats-register.$value: N articles across N categories, last updated YYYY-MM-DD
stats-register.$description: Plain factual sentence. No trailing period. Trailing period is a P2 server.rs fix.

lede.$description: index.md body passthrough. Lede-only pattern (2026-05-05): index.md contains one paragraph only.

featured-article.$description: Framed panel. Reads featured-topic.yaml. Suppress slot entirely when file absent.

heading-text.$description: Wikipedia register — not 'Featured article of the day'.

portal-grid.$description: Category gateway cards. Suppress when tenant has no categories (flat wikis: corporate, projects).

recent-additions.$description: Top 5 articles sorted by last_edited descending.

other-areas.$description: Per-tenant link list. P2 fix: replace hardcoded documentation GitHub links.

layout.$description: Page-level grid and spacing for the home chrome.

typography.$description: Type scale for home-chrome slots. Inherits font stacks from primitive.json.

slot-heading.$description: h2 slot headings — sentence case per Wikipedia register.

chrome.$description: Surface, border, and interactive tokens for home-chrome slots.

frame-color.$description: Left-border accent on the featured article panel.

state.$description: Rendering rules for edge-case slot states.

visible.$description: Render empty category card (0 articles) with muted style and 'No articles yet' placeholder.
Suppress slot entirely when featured-topic.yaml is absent.
Show even when only 1 article exists; suppress count display.

leapfrog-extensions.$description: Five leapfrog-2030 extensions beyond Wikipedia Main Page anatomy. Extensions 4–5 are gated.

scope.$value: WebSite + ItemList (category grid) + Article (featured) + ItemList (recent additions) in <head>
max(last_edited) surfaced under stats banner or recent-additions heading
Contributing section includes direct /edit/ link in Wikipedia-register plain prose

gate.$value: citations.yaml resolution pass wired in build pipeline
